title: Extended Weather Radius
description: Increases the allowed radius of weather particles
body:
Increases the possible maximum setting for the "Weather Effects Radius" option.

The default maximum radius for weather particles when combined with vanilla Minecraft's particle system leaves a lot to be desired in the visual department, in my opinion. This mod improves on that by increasing the maximum possible setting for the "Weather Effects Radius" option.

## QnA - Why does it cap out at 15? - There are a few caps set on this option; it is set to 15, as that's the maximum amount with minimal tinkering. It will hopefully be increased in the future. - Is there a performace hit? - Almost certainly. While I haven't tested the exact value, keep in mind that you are adding multiple blocks' worth of particles for every increase. - Will this impact mods? - If they use the vanilla Weather Effect Radius setting, then yes.
